system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_thongke_muahang_bytear","body":"
CREATE   PROC TR_THONGKE_MUAHANG_BYTEAR(@nam int)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT YEAR(A.ngaydat) AS nam,
		A.tenncc, B.chitiet, B.tenchitiet, 
		thanhtien = SUM(B.thanhtien),
		T1 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 1 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T2 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 2 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T3 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 3 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T4 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 4 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T5 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 5 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T6 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 6 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T7 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 7 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T8 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 8 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T9 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 9 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T10 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 10 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T11 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 11 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0),
		T12 = ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(A.ngaydat) = 12 THEN B.thanhtien END), 0)
	INTO #THONGKE_MUAHANG
	FROM tr_dondathang A
		INNER JOIN tr_dondathang_chitiet B ON A.maddh = B.maddh
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND A.pheduyet = '1'
		AND YEAR(A.ngaydat) = @nam
	GROUP BY YEAR(A.ngaydat), A.tenncc, B.chitiet, B.tenchitiet

	SELECT A.nam, A.tenncc, A.chitiet, A.tenchitiet, B.quycach, B.mausac, 
		A.thanhtien, T1, T2, T3, T4, T5, T6, T7, T8, T9, T10, T11, T12,
		CASE 
			WHEN SUM(A.thanhtien) OVER (PARTITION BY A.tenncc) = 0 THEN 0 
			ELSE ROUND(A.thanhtien / SUM(A.thanhtien) OVER (PARTITION BY A.tenncc), 4) 
		END AS percentage_of_supplier_total_salary
	FROM #THONGKE_MUAHANG A
		LEFT JOIN tr_material B ON A.chitiet = B.mavt

	DROP TABLE #THONGKE_MUAHANG;
END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
